title: Night Match Editorial Poster 2 AI
sourceTitle: Night Match Editorial Poster 2 AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: premium sports editorial poster built around fictional elite midfielder with focused expression and unbranded navy kit. Subject: fictional elite midfielder with focused expression and unbranded navy kit appears as the fictional hero athlete with clear expression, unbranded kit, and high-energy presence. Scene: international night stadium campaign with smoke bands and magazine-cover energy creates the campaign atmosphere, stadium texture, and editorial sports context. Composition: Fixed sports-poster composition with one dominant athlete, strong hero pose, clean typography zone, and premium magazine hierarchy. Style: Cinematic sports editorial with dramatic studio lighting, crisp fabric detail, clean unbranded design, and polished campaign finish. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: NIGHT MATCH appears as short readable sports-poster text, integrated without logos or sponsor marks. Signature Elements: fictional elite midfielder with focused expression and unbranded navy kit, international night stadium campaign with smoke bands and magazine-cover energy, chest-up portrait turning slightly toward camera with clenched fist near the jersey crest area, and NIGHT MATCH define the reusable sports editorial poster. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: premium sports editorial poster built around fictional women football captain with braided hair and unbranded crimson kit. Subject: fictional women football captain with braided hair and unbranded crimson kit appears as the fictional hero athlete with clear expression, unbranded kit, and high-energy presence. Scene: championship stadium tunnel with confetti haze, floodlights, and premium sports editorial mood creates the campaign atmosphere, stadium texture, and editorial sports context. Style: Cinematic sports editorial with dramatic studio lighting, crisp fabric detail, clean unbranded design, and polished campaign finish. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: LEGACY NIGHT appears as short readable sports-poster text, integrated without logos or sponsor marks. Signature Elements: fictional women football captain with braided hair and unbranded crimson kit, championship stadium tunnel with confetti haze, floodlights, and premium sports editorial mood, mid-stride captain pose with one hand pointing forward and the other holding a football, and LEGACY NIGHT define the reusable sports editorial poster. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
